{{Quote|Pushy for such a young fellow, aren’t you.|ST-347|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''ST-347''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was the squad leader of the ambush squad for [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] members [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during their [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|quest]] to retrieve the moss painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]''.<ref name="TG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tatooine Ghost (abridged audiobook)|''Tatooine Ghost'' abridged audiobook]]
